test case id: tc-u-moviment-004 title: user login module: u-moviment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the login page. test data: valid email and password. test steps: 1. enter a valid email address in the email field. 2. enter a valid password in the password field. 3. click the login button. expected result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard with a success message displayed.
